hooks.command: bash -c 'd="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$d/CLAUDE.md" ] && [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ "$d" != "$(dirname "$d")" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; test -f "$d/.deps-ok" || echo "🏛️ [JANUS] Dependencies not found. Invoke /janus-setup before doing anything else."'

python -c "import os,sys;d=os.getcwd()
while not os.path.exists(os.path.join(d,'CLAUDE.md')) and d!=os.path.dirname(d):
  d=os.path.dirname(d)
os.chdir(d);sys.path.insert(0,os.path.join(d,'tools'));from privacy_filter import cmd_hook_check;cmd_hook_check()"
